ext_weather.name: Today
ext_weather.detailedForecast: Rain showers likely before 4pm. Cloudy, with a high near 46. North wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
